author: lOrm
content: #605 closed. DDG->Tavily->Brave cascade rotation confirmed in src/web.rs::search_web (lines 603-630): DuckDuckGo tried first (free, no key), Tavily fallback if TAVILY_API_KEY set, Brave fallback if BRAVE_API_KEY set. Anthropic-native web_search_20250305 requires server-side tool plumbing only available on firstParty/vertex/foundry providers — that's a multi-day feature tracked separately. The third-party-API rotation half of the issue is in place.
